## Why It Changed

Explain the problem, workflow, or risk this addresses.

## Screenshots

Required for UI changes. Add before/after screenshots or note `N/A`.

## Test Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint:migrations`
- [ ] `npm run openapi:check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:web`
- [ ] Docker compose/image smoke checked when Docker, deployment, or runtime files changed
- [ ] Security scan impact considered when dependencies, auth, Docker, uploads, secrets, or network behavior changed

## Release Notes / Changelog

- [ ] Changelog or release notes needed
- [ ] No release note needed

User-facing note:

```text

```

## Security Impact

Describe auth, secret handling, dependency, scanner, container, SSRF, file access, or data exposure impact. Use `N/A` only when there is no security-relevant behavior.

## Breaking Changes

Describe migrations, config changes, API changes, environment variables, image tags, or operator actions. Use `None` if there are no breaking changes.
